context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the seed-database instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use ENV variables (e.g., ENV.fetch('DEFAULT_SEED_PASSWORD')) or SecureRandom.hex(16) for non-production data

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use `rails credentials:edit` to manage production secrets, never commit them in code

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write idempotent seeds** — use `find_or_create_by!` so re-runs are safe.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run seeds** — execute `rails db:seed` (or `rails db:setup` for a fresh database).

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify data** — open `rails console` and spot-check expected records exist with correct attributes.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use `find_or_create_by!` to keep seeds idempotent — safe to run multiple times.
